name: xcpGetCalPage
title: xcpGetCalPage
syntax: void void xcpGetCalPage(char ecuQualifier[], byte mode, byte segmentNr);
description: If the XCP slave device supports calibration data page switching, this command gets the currently active page and access mode.
The callback returns the currently active calibration data page of the ECU.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Name of the device, configured within the CANoe XCP/CCP Window.
